heading: Sisize silungise izinkinga ngokushesha
description: Umbiko wakho wakha udaba lwe-GitHub ukuze abahleli baluhlole.
safetyWarning: Gcina lo mbiko uphephile emphakathini. Ungafaki ulwazi lomuntu siqu, amakheli e-imeyili, izinombolo zocingo, amakheli asekhaya/asemsebenzini, noma izimfihlo ze-akhawunti.
stepsPlaceholder:
1. Vula uhlelo lokusebenza
2. Thepha ...
3. Bona iphutha
screenshotsPlaceholder: Namathisela izixhumanisi zezithombe-skrini, amavidiyo, noma amafayela efu
errorApi404: I-API yombiko wephutha ayitholakali kule ndawo. Uma uhlola endaweni, sebenzisa isayithi elishicilelwe ukuze uthumele.
errorApi403: Le ndawo yomsuka ayivunyelwe ukuthumela imibiko yamaphutha. Sicela uhlole i-APP_ORIGINS endaweni yakho yangemuva.
errorApi500: Insizakalo yombiko wephutha ayikamiswanga okwamanje. Sicela uqinisekise iziguquguquki zendawo ze-GitHub token ne-repo.
errorApi502: Ukwakhiwa kodaba lwe-GitHub kuhlulekile ngaphezulu. Sicela uzame futhi ngemva komzuzu.
errorApiGeneric: Asikwazanga ukuthumela umbiko wakho wephutha okwamanje (HTTP {{status}}).
errorNetwork: Iphutha lenethiwekhi ngenkathi kuthunywa umbiko wephutha. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumana kwakho bese uzama futhi.
successMessage: Udaba #{{number}} lwakhiwe ngempumelelo futhi lulungele ukuhlolwa ngabahleli.
